# PGS — Complete Business Information

> PGS delivers occupational medicine solutions nationwide. Pre-employment testing, 24/7 injury case management, triage, telemedicine, and MRO services across all 50 states with 1,500+ clinic partners.

## About PGS

PGS is a trusted Medicalbusiness serving customers in Port Allen, LA and surrounding areas. With a focus on quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction, PGS has built a reputation for delivering professional results at fair prices.

## Services Offered

### Pre-Employment Testing
PGS offers professional pre-employment testing services in Port Allen, LA.

### Injury Case Management
PGS offers professional injury case management services in Port Allen, LA.

### Request a Consultation
PGS offers professional request a consultation services in Port Allen, LA.

## Service Area

PGS serves Port Allen, LA and surrounding communities.
